prompt_text: A full shot inside an ancient Chinese bedchamber facing the doorway: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, stands at the left side of the threshold in rigid confrontation; opposite her at the right stands Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, meeting her with an icy, wounded stare. In the deeper background, Gao Fu, a dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, subtle chest-pain gesture, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, stands stiff and stunned. Further inside, Lu Shuyi, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, fragile yet calculating expression, and Jiang Sheng, a tall, upright young Chinese man from a historical drama, athletic but not bulky, honest and restrained expression, clear long eyes, straight nose, neat black topknot, dark indigo round-collar robe with light armor-like riding details, humble yet dependable aura, slight blush on ears, remain collapsed or unconscious in the middle-rear scandal scene. Blurred scattered garments lie in the lower foreground, the doorframe pins all figures into a trapped tableau, cold dusk light presses in from outside while the indoor candle flames are nearly dying, low-saturation gray-blue, dark wood brown, and fading amber palette, severe spatial compression and silent judgment. cinematic historical drama realism, chapter-ending freeze-frame feeling, highly detailed, deep emotional tension, subtle film grain
